error: LinkedIn profile and activity pages are not accessible via web scraping API - returns 404 ENTITY_NOT_FOUND

details.limitation: LinkedIn blocks direct scraping of profile pages and posts. Alternative approaches needed: authenticated LinkedIn API access, browser automation with login, or third-party data providers.

recommendation: To successfully scrape LinkedIn posts, consider: 1) Using LinkedIn's official API with proper authentication and permissions, 2) Browser automation tools (Selenium/Playwright) with authenticated session, 3) Third-party LinkedIn data providers
